description_long: This is a vintage-style portable record player with a rectangular wooden case and a hinged lid decorated with a variety of colorful stickers, including slogans and graphic designs. The lid opens upward to reveal the turntable platter, tonearm, and control knobs, all set into a dark, textured base. The exterior of the case is a warm, medium-brown wood finish, with black speaker grilles on the front and sides, and reinforced black corner protectors. The interior of the lid is lined and covered with stickers, giving it a personalized, urban aesthetic. The front features a metal latch and handle, suggesting the device is designed for portability and easy transport.
description: A portable, vintage-style wooden record player with a sticker-covered lid, black speaker grilles, and visible turntable components inside.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the closed wooden lid covered in various colorful stickers.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, revealing the turntable platter, tonearm, and control knobs inside the wooden case.
description_view_2: Front view with the lid open, displaying the stickered interior, turntable platter, tonearm, and control knobs, as well as the front latch and handle.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the open lid, interior stickers, and the arrangement of the turntable components.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and centrally located inside the case, the turntable platter is circular, black, and occupies a significant portion of the interior. It appears to be made of plastic or rubber, with a matte finish and a smooth surface, lacking visible grooves or patterns.
attribute_tonearm: Present, the tonearm is a straight, slender component positioned to the right of the platter. It is light gray or silver in color, likely made of metal or plastic, and features a pivot joint at its base. The tonearm is resting in its holder, not positioned over the platter.
attribute_control_knobs: Three small, round control knobs are visible on the right side of the turntable base. They are black, made of plastic, and have a matte finish. No visible labels or markings are discernible from the images.
attribute_dust_cover: The lid of the case acts as a dust cover. It is made of wood, opaque, and is attached to the main body with metal hinges. The lid is open in the images and is decorated with various stickers on the inside surface.
